patch.value: Action-scoped MCP parameter descriptions: split shared name/target description per action (schema vs profile)

CodeRabbit (PR #404) noted the shared 'name'/'target' parameter description in the pm_run aggregated action schema (src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-parameter-tables.ts) enumerates BOTH schema uses (type/status/field key) and profile uses (profile name) for every action that takes name, so the schema action's name mentions profiles and vice versa. The narrow tools (pm_schema, pm_profile) already carry action-specific name descriptions; only the generic pm_run per-action schema shares one table entry. Fixing this cleanly requires action-scoped parameter description overrides in the contracts system (a parameter table keyed by action+param, not just param). Deferred from #404 (pm-j1fj) as a focused contracts enhancement.

Added a per-action parameter-description override table (PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCOPED_PARAMETER_METADATA) consulted by actionScopedToolParameterMetadata, so the pm_run aggregated action schema gives the schema and profile actions their own `name` description instead of one shared entry enumerating both.

In the action-scoped strict tool schema, the schema action's `name` describes only schema uses and the profile action's `name` describes only profile uses; the flat provider schema keeps a single combined `name` description.

PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCOPED_PARAMETER_METADATA added in tool-parameter-tables.ts and wired through actionScopedToolParameterMetadata in tool-schema.ts; strict schema version bumped 4.0.5→4.0.6; full.json regenerated; schema.name='Custom item type name (...)/status id/field key', profile.name='Profile name for show/apply/lint ...'; flat provider `name` unchanged; 100% coverage retained.

value.note: PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCOPED_PARAMETER_METADATA: per-action name overrides for schema and profile
actionScopedToolParameterMetadata consults the per-action override table; strict schema version 4.0.6
asserts schema vs profile name descriptions diverge and the flat provider name stays combined

patch.value: regenerated contract snapshot with divergent per-action name descriptions and x-schema-version 4.0.6

value.note: asserts schema vs profile name descriptions diverge and the flat provider name stays combined

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation evidence: generalized the existing plan-only action override hook into PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCOPED_PARAMETER_METADATA (keyed action->param->{description,examples}); actionScopedToolParameterMetadata now checks plan first, then this table, then the shared PM_TOOL_PARAMETER_METADATA. Only `name` was conflated (schema and profile are the only actions taking it; `target` is in neither contract). schema.name and profile.name now carry action-scoped descriptions matching the narrow pm_schema/pm_profile tool wording; the flat provider schema keeps the combined description. Strict schema bumped 4.0.5->4.0.6 (additive). Verified: pnpm contracts:check current; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test action-schema-parity + contracts-command + sdk-index (163 tests); full coverage 100%.

patch.value: Action-scoped name descriptions delivered: the schema and profile actions now carry their own `name` description in the aggregated pm_run schema via PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCOPED_PARAMETER_METADATA, with the flat provider schema keeping the combined entry. Verified by contract tests, snapshot regen, and full coverage. Shipping in PR for feat/mcp-extension-aware-builtin-actions.
